name: Vornado MVH Whole Room Vortex Heater
tag: Best Compact Space Heater for Any Room
introText: The Vornado MVH uses vortex circulation to heat rooms more evenly than directional fan heaters — backed by a 5-year warranty, with auto safety shutoffs and a cool-touch exterior in a footprint small enough for desks and nightstands.

specs.Safety: Auto tip-over shutoff + auto overheat shutoff

whatWorks: Vortex heat circulation distributes warmth more evenly than directional ceramic heaters — instead of pushing heat in one direction, the MVH's deep-dish design circulates heated air through the room via vortex action. Rooms feel warmer faster because the heat reaches people regardless of where they're sitting.

5-year warranty is the longest in the consumer space heater category — Vornado backs the MVH with 5 full years of warranty coverage, significantly longer than the 1-year warranty on Lasko and most competitors. Long-term owner reviews consistently confirm units running 6-10 years without failure.

Auto shutoffs are dual and reliable — both tip-over and overheat shutoffs are standard and trigger quickly. Particularly important for households with children, pets, or areas with limited ventilation.

Compact footprint fits on desks, nightstands, and small floor spaces — the 21x18cm base is significantly smaller than tower heaters, allowing placement in tight quarters like under desks, beside nightstands, or in bathroom corners.
worthKnowing: 1500W like all standard 120V heaters — Vornado's advantage is how heat is distributed, not how much power is used. All residential 120V electric heaters share the 1500W ceiling.

Small size means smaller heating element area — the MVH heats rooms primarily through air circulation rather than radiant surface area. For very cold rooms or large spaces, it takes longer to reach target temperature than larger units.
Fan noise is audible, not silent — the MVH makes fan noise similar to other ceramic fan heaters. Not suitable for silent bedroom overnight use (see De'Longhi HMP1500 for that).
Vornado MVH vs 1500 model — the MVH is the compact version; the 1500 is larger with more heat surface area. Both have the 5-year warranty. The MVH suits smaller spaces.

commonComplaints.title: Takes longer to heat large cold…
commonComplaints.body: Takes longer to heat large cold rooms than expected — the vortex circulation is effective once room air is circulating, but initial warm-up in a very cold or large space takes longer than a high-output directional heater.

commonComplaints.title: Fan noise present at all settings…
commonComplaints.body: Fan noise present at all settings — unlike silent panel heaters, the MVH requires its fan to circulate heat, producing continuous fan noise that's noticeable in quiet environments.

commonComplaints.title: Small physical size limits radiant surface…
commonComplaints.body: Small physical size limits radiant surface area — the MVH compensates with vortex circulation, but in very cold rooms the compact heater element takes longer to achieve target temperature than larger units.

verdict: The Vornado MVH is the best compact space heater for Canadian homes. The 5-year warranty combined with Vornado's documented long-term reliability makes it the safest long-term investment in this category. Vortex circulation genuinely distributes heat more evenly than directional alternatives. The main competition is the Lasko 755320 (oscillating tower, easier to find, slightly cheaper) — the Vornado wins on warranty and even-heat distribution; the Lasko wins on tower form factor for room corners.

realBuyers.quote: The 5-year warranty is why I bought Vornado specifically. Had it 4 years with zero issues. Would buy again.
Heats my home office so evenly. I can feel it from anywhere in the room, not just in front of it like my old heater.
Had my first one for 8 years. Bought a second for the bedroom. Vornado makes heaters that last.

metaDescription: Vornado MVH review for Canada: 1500W vortex heat, 5-year warranty, tip-over + overheat shutoff, cool-touch. ~$99 CAD on Amazon.ca. Best compact space heater.
